_comment: Issue 238: a degraded capture — the 'role-claim guard' add decision carries NO patternRefs, so it is unsatisfied (§3.2). Two of three required capabilities are satisfied → score 0.6667, below the 0.8 threshold, with missing ['role-claim guard']. This is exactly the signal validatePlannerArtifact-passing captures can still hide from a plain AC-coverage eval.
